case_title: GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORP. vs. NELSON, VERONICA F.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, VERONICA F.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, VERONICA F. $1,040.86 PRINCIPAL, $1,218.69 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,282.55, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE 033-903 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY A COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORP.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPL & NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORP. SERVED MAY-08-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, VERONICA F.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 6/13/01, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
